task_completion.description: Navigate to the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displays the CAMEO Chemicals website (cameochemicals.noaa.gov).

task_completion.description: Search for and open the Benzene (CAS 71-43-2) datasheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the specific CAMEO Chemicals datasheet for Benzene, showing its chemical profile and identifiers like CAS 71-43-2.

task_completion.description: Create the output text file for documenting properties.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open with a file named 'benzene_properties.txt'.

task_completion.description: Document all 10 required physical/chemical properties with their values and units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains entries for Boiling Point, Melting/Freezing Point, Flash Point, Vapor Pressure, Specific Gravity, Lower Explosive Limit (LEL), Upper Explosive Limit (UEL), IDLH, Vapor Density, and Water Solubility, including their respective values and units.

task_completion.description: Format each property on its own line and save to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file shows each property clearly separated on its own line, and the file path or save dialog confirms it is saved in the ~/Documents/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual CAMEO Chemicals web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent actively navigating, searching, or scrolling within a graphical web browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl) to fetch the webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the extracted data comes from the CAMEO Chemicals datasheet and not the agent's internal knowledge.
integrity.visual_evidence: The documented values and units in the text file should match the specific formats provided by the CAMEO website (e.g., matching the privileged info), rather than generic or differently-formatted values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually documented the information rather than running a pre-written script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The task is completed via standard UI interaction (browser and text editor) rather than executing a python or bash script to automatically generate the output file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified CAMEO Chemicals data for Benzene (CAS 71-43-2): Boiling Point: 80.1°C (176.2°F); Flash Point: -11.1°C (12°F); Specific Gravity: 0.879; Melting Point: 5.5°C (41.9°F); Vapor Pressure: 76 mmHg; LEL: 1.4%; UEL: 8%; IDLH: 500 ppm; Vapor Density: 2.77; Water Solubility: 1-5 mg/mL. Output file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/benzene_properties.txt.
